summary:
PROPHETIC CALLING AND INTERCESSORY PRAYER: Brandon explains that God corrected him regarding his online mission after he listened to a prophetic word by Cindy Jacobs. God instructed Brandon to raise a dedicated prayer force capable of altering future events through intercession. Brandon states his role is to act as a Watchman, sounding the alarm about upcoming spiritual visions so that the body of Christ can pray against these impending threats. He clarifies that when prophesied disasters do not occur, it is a result of successful intercessory prayer rather than a failed prediction.

VISIONS OF NATIONAL AND GLOBAL EVENTS: Brandon details several specific threats he has been shown, including holiday violence at malls, border issues, events concerning Israel, upcoming elections, earthquakes, and a looming financial crisis. He also mentions seeing skyrocketing oil prices and an unprecedented attack on an oil refinery, as well as severe weather patterns like long-track tornadoes. Additionally, Brandon notes that God warns him about specific political figures, naming Gavin and Kamala Harris, urging believers to pray for government leaders at all levels to foster godly leadership and expose darkness.

SPIRITUAL AUTHORITY AND THE RAPTURE: Brandon emphasizes that believers possess spiritual authority on earth to hinder the devil's plans. He connects this dominion to the upcoming Rapture of the church, explaining that once the believers are removed, the devil will have unrestricted power during the seven-year tribulation. Until that time, Brandon urges people to exercise their authority over their homes, neighborhoods, and even severe weather by anointing their houses with oil, pleading the blood of Jesus, and declaring protection.

COMBATING EVIL WITH THE WORD OF GOD: Brandon recounts a personal experience in his laundry room where he heard an audible demonic voice. He explains that God instructed him not to merely pray or entertain the voice, but to actively use the Word of God as a spiritual sword. Drawing a parallel to Jesus resisting temptation in the wilderness by quoting scripture, Brandon teaches that believers must speak biblical words directly to drive out evil and overcome attacks on their health, wealth, and families.

HEALING, MIRACLES, AND PROSPERITY IN 2024: Brandon declares that 2024 will be a year characterized by significant miracles, signs, wonders, and financial overflow for believers. He pronounces specific healings over various medical conditions, including cancer, diabetes, heart disease, Alzheimer's, dementia, cataracts, autism, and women's reproductive health issues, even declaring creative miracles like the formation of new organs. Furthermore, Brandon speaks financial deliverance, praying that debts will be paid and needs will be abundantly met as believers prioritize their faith.
rawData: [January 02, 2024]-[The purpose of the Watchman on the wall is to warn the people to pray]-[https://youtu.be/AxpDtkt_p7Q]-[Good morning, family! I'm excited to be with you all again today. I have some things on my heart. I really want to make this clear about my gifting and what the Lord has called me to be on YouTube for. I was listening to Cindy Jacobs' prophetic word about 2024 last night, and she was talking about intercessory prayer. When I was listening to it, the Lord spoke to me and said, 'Brandon, you're missing it.' I said, 'Lord, how am I missing it? What am I doing?' He said, 'I called you on YouTube and I told you to raise up a prayer force—people that would pray, telling the people about what you see in the spirit when I pray about what's coming, and to warn them.' He said many of the things I have shown you, you can change through prayer. I want to make a list of things I told you all to pray about: the malls and what the Lord showed me about the malls for the holidays. There was only one incident in Florida that happened, and I believe one person passed away, which is too many. In my opinion, anyone who perishes—and we don't know if they know Jesus—whenever anything tragic happens, that's terrible. But one thing: whenever the Lord showed me in the vision, I saw multiple events across America from Black Friday all the way through the Christmas season. These events were trying to take place in America, and I believe the power of prayer changed that. So here it is: He's showing me about the borders, Israel, and the elections. I came on here and told you all about the earthquakes and the financial crisis coming. There are so many things that He shows me. People go, 'Well, you missed it; it didn't happen.' No, I pray to God it doesn't happen. My job is to be the Watchman on the wall and to tell you, 'Warning! Warning! Warning! This is coming! There is a storm coming!' This is what the body of Christ needs because there are people who don't have eyes to see in the spirit realm, but there are some who do. I believe the people who are gifted with that are called to warn and sound the alarm. We can pray and change things by intercessory prayer, by bringing it to the attention of the body. The Watchman goes and tells the troops, 'Hey, this is what the enemy is coming and going to try to do in the next couple of months and the next year. He's going to try to do this in the next two years, three years, whatever, and you all need to be prepared for this so that you are praying.' Like I told you all, I saw the oil prices going sky-high. I saw an attack against an oil refinery that's never happened. Praise God that it hasn't happened because that would be a major event that would cause oil and gas prices to skyrocket. Now, have we stopped it? I don't know, but I believe with all my heart we can turn things. Whenever I saw Gavin and I've seen Kamala Harris and all these things taking place, the Lord warns me about these politicians. He tells me to pray for them and tells me to tell you all what I see coming and what He's warning me about: to sound the alarm and ring the bell about storms, long-track tornadoes, things like that. The Lord's trying to warn the body. It's not so that it will happen and the devil steamroll over us. We have power and authority in this earth as long as we are here. That's why I believe so much there will be a Rapture of the church, because we are hindering the works of the devil as believers who know their authority and are seated with Him. According to what Ephesians says, we are seated with Him in the heavenlies, far above all principalities, powers, and might. We have authority over the devil, and so he's not able to operate at full throttle in what he wants to do in this earth as long as the salt and the light are still here. That's why I believe there will be a Rapture of the church and we are taken out of here so that he can rule and reign and do whatever he wants to do for that seven-year tribulation time. It's going to be hell on Earth. So, I'm trying to tell you all, as long as the body and the bride are still here and we are ruling and reigning and taking our dominion and our authority, we're able to change things through the power of prayer. It went along with what I was talking about earlier regarding Cindy Jacobs. She was talking about taking your authority in prayer prophetically about what she saw coming, with economies crashing and everything else. The Lord shook me and told me, 'Yes, you're going on there and telling them what's coming and warning them about things, son, but you're not doing the rest of the call. You are to take authority over things in prayer.' We can steer the ship! We can turn storms! We can turn major events in the weather. Whenever the weatherman comes on and says, 'Hey, there's going to be a severe weather outbreak in the spring this year,' we don't have to have that over our area. You can anoint your house with oil and anoint your area and say, 'Thus far and no further, Satan! You're not coming around our house. Big hailstones are not going to hit our roof; they're not going to tear up our car.' We have authority over that stuff. Even over your town—drive around and plead the blood over every place the soles of your feet tread. Everywhere I go, I say I have dominion and authority. I pray and ask, 'God, over my area, my neighborhood, and over this area, Father, I thank You that there's a covering of grace and mercy over my neighborhood. No weapon formed against us is going to prosper. As for me and my house, we're going to serve the Lord.' That's what we do. So I encourage you all: do it. Take your dominion, take your authority, and do it in these last days until we're taken out of here. We have a job to do. I'm not here just to tickle your ears in entertainment to tell you, 'Hey, this is what I saw coming.' We have to pray for 45. We need to pray for him. This is the plan from the enemy; he's going to try to do this and that. You need to do these things and pray over these things. I saw earthquakes and the land splitting off, and the Lord's warning me about volcanoes and all this stuff. Yes, I know that the Bible says these things will happen—earthquakes in divers places, volcanoes, signs in the heavens. All these things are going to take place, and we cannot change what the Word of God has told us is coming. Yes, there will be birthing pains, and yes, things are going to get really bad. The Word talks about how it will get worse and worse; men's hearts will fail them for fear of the things that are coming upon the earth. The Bible says that men will be lovers of themselves, and those things are going to happen, but it doesn't have to affect you. You have the power and authority to walk above and tread upon all serpents and scorpions, and nothing shall by any means hurt you. You have the ability to walk in victory. You have God inside you—you are wall-to-wall Holy Ghost! He dwells on the inside of you, and when you pray in the spirit and seek Him daily—not just on Sundays—seek Him every day. Be instant in season and out of season, praying in the spirit, seeking His face, knowing who He is. He said that if you abide in Me and My words abide in you, you shall ask what you will and it shall be done. That means if you are abiding in His Word, if you get that Word down inside of you—if you abide in Him and His words, the Holy Ghost's words, that Bible abides in you—you shall ask what you will and it shall be done. Well, praise the Lord! That right there tells you everything you need to know. If you're in the Word, it shall be done. He'll move Heaven and Earth; He'll do whatever it takes to move on your behalf. Faith works by love. When you're walking in love, walking in grace, and walking in His mercy, and you're keeping strife out of your house—because faith works by love—you're using your faith every day and walking out your salvation with fear and trembling. You're walking in holiness and not walking like a little heathen, saying, 'Well, I'm going to live half of my life in the world and half of my life in the church.' No, we need to live sold out. I'm sold out for Jesus every day. I want to be sold out for Jesus, and that's what I tell Him: 'Lord, I want You to be the Lord of my life.' I don't want to be like those He mentioned when I was praying. He said there are a lot of Christians who say they know Him, but their hearts are so far from Him. He told me, 'Brandon, remember I told them: depart from Me, I never knew you.' So I want to encourage you all today: whenever I come on and tell you these things, it's to warn you and sound the alarm as a Watchman. My job in the spirit realm is to warn you. This is the plan of the devil, and I'm trying to expose it and say, 'Listen, pray, pray, pray!' It's not 'doom, doom, doom,' because the Lord said, 'I called you to say the hard things about what's coming.' I'm just trying to tell you all to intercede and pray for America, pray for your nations, pray for the leaders, and the people who are over your area. Your governors, your mayors—all of it is important. Anybody who is ruling and has authority over your area, even the sheriff or whoever is in law enforcement—pray for them. Pray that they have wisdom and that godly leadership would rise up, that they would have an encounter with Jesus, and that they would expose darkness and uncover it. As long as we're here, things will be good for us. We're not supposed to live in drama; we're supposed to live in blessing and increase in our houses. We're the salt of the earth so that people look at us and say, 'What do they do differently? Why do they have so much peace? Why do they have so much joy in their houses? How are they able to do what they do?' And all we do is give God all the glory. When they ask, I have to tell you the answer to my success is Jesus. Jesus paid the price for me, and He paid the price for you, sir or ma'am. Jesus took all my infirmities, all my sickness, all my torment, and all our poverty. Jesus paid the price for you to walk in victory. You don't have to live in a devil's hell; you're able to walk in victory over every area of your life if you get in that Bible, read that Word, get it down inside of your heart, and live by faith and walk it out in love. I'm telling you: Jesus, Jesus, Jesus! You'll have heaven on Earth in your house. It's not for you to live in depression, anxiety, fear, and worry about what's going to come. 'Oh no, what's the big bad devil going to do tomorrow? Is he going to come up here and beat us all in the head?' No! Don't let him mess with you. I'm telling you, I was praying and interceding for a minister, and an audible voice spoke to me. I was in my laundry room and I was praying, and I knew it was the devil. He was ticked off about what my YouTube channel was doing, and he had things to say. I was entertaining his voice, listening to what he had to say because I was like, 'Whoa, what's going on with this?' And the Lord spoke to me and said, 'Brandon, what are you doing?' I said, 'I'm listening to what he has to say.' He said, 'Remember your training, son.' I was instantaneously shook inside, and I started praying in tongues and interceding. The Lord said, 'Brandon, he's not going to move based on praying; he's going to move by the Word. You've got to get the Word. The Word is the sword.' Do you get it? The sword of the Spirit! You've got to get that Word out of your mouth. 'Submit yourself therefore unto God, resist the devil, and he will flee in terror.' You've got to get that Word out of your mouth and cut that devil up with that sword. The sword of the Spirit is the Word, and the Word comes out of you, and it's sharper than any two-edged sword. So you get it out there and you find those scriptures. That's what I started doing. Instead of praying, I stopped and remembered what the Lord said to me: 'Quote this Word at him.' Just like I tried to tell you all before, Jesus did not pray when the devil came to Him when He was tempted for forty days. He didn't say, 'Jesus, I'm going to pray you away.' No, He used, 'It is written, Satan! It is written. It is written: man shall not live by bread alone but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of God. It is written: do not tempt the Lord thy God.' Over and over and over, every time the devil had something to say, Jesus did not combat it with prayer; He combated it with the Word. So if the devil's coming against your mind today and he's tormenting you, or he's trying to rob your children of health or rob you of wealth, you've got to speak the Word out of your mouth concerning it. You can't pray him away. God is not going to do anything else about the devil concerning your situation; He's already done it. He said, 'I've given you power and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions, and nothing shall by any means hurt you.' He gave you the power to do it. You have to take authority over the devil. God's up there going, 'Hey, I've already done it for you. You've got to speak it. You've got to use My Word. You've got to cut that devil's head off today. You've got to run him out of your house.' God's not going to do anything else to run the devil out of your house. You've got to anoint your house with oil, plead the blood, take authority over your children, and quote the Word over them. You have what you say. I hope you're hearing me, because the devil is going to run you over and take over your house if you don't start using your authority more and more in these last days. Jesus gave it all to you; He paid the price for you to have that. In the Old Covenant, they had to rely on God doing things like that. But after Jesus came and gave us a New Covenant, He came inside to dwell. We are wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. He dwells on the inside of us, and He's like a roaring fire inside of us. We have the fire of the Holy Ghost to drive out all that stuff by the power of His Word. Then we pray and we hear Him by speaking in tongues. You pray in the spirit and you pray in English, and you worship Him. Relationship comes through prayer. By drawing close to Him, things change and start getting better and better. Yes, there are trials and tribulations, but He said, 'Many are the afflictions of the righteous, but the Lord delivers them out of them all.' He's given you power to overcome them all. Many are the afflictions of the righteous, folks, but that's all right. We keep rising up. When we fall or mess up, or when the waves of life try to knock us down, we keep rising up and say, 'No, we're going to stand on the Word. We're going to keep on keeping on.' We're not going to give up. Jesus is in us and He loves us. I hope that blessed you all today. It's important you understand that I'm not just here to entertain you; I'm trying to tell you to pray. If we don't see these things, praise God—we did our job. I'm a prophetic intercessor. Father, we just thank You for every single person who watches these videos. I thank You, Father, that You are becoming more and more inside of them, that they realize who they are in You—that greater is He that is in them than he that is in the world, and that they have dominion, power, and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions. I thank You, Father, that Your Word says we are seated with You in the heavenlies, far above all principalities, powers, and might. Father, I thank You that we have dominion over the devil. In our houses and our homes, we will serve You all the days of our life. Father, right now we call healing over their bodies and deliverance over them in the name of Jesus. No weapon formed against them is going to prosper concerning sickness and disease. You said that by Your stripes we are healed. You were wounded for our transgressions and bruised for our iniquities. Father, I thank You that they're healed today. We take authority over cancer, diabetes, heart disease, Alzheimer's, and dementia. I just saw that right now: I call women's issues, hormone imbalances, and whole and well right now in the name of Jesus. From the top of your head to the soles of your feet—women's issues, tumors, and things like that—I call your uterus to be healed and well. Some of you say, 'Well, I don't even have a uterus.' I call you to have a brand-new one in Jesus' name. God is a creative, miracle-working God. He's able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. This is going to be a season of creative miracles like this world has never seen before. Great creative miracle-working power is coming, and it's happening now. 2024 is going to be a year of great miracles, signs, and wonders. Father, I thank You. Blinded eyes are opening right now in Jesus' name. I speak to cataracts to go now in Jesus' name. I call for new eardrums. I call their ears to open right now in Jesus' name. I speak life into your eardrums and into your ears. I call people with autism to be healed, cysts on the ovaries healed, whole, and well by the power of the blood of Jesus. I call deliverance from any demonic spirits right now in Jesus' name. I command them to go now. You have no right to hold on to that child of the Most High God. Whatever they have need of, Jesus, You paid the price. I call their needs met, their debts paid off, and an overflow harvest in 2024 in the name of Jesus. Whatever they sow, they'll reap a big harvest. No more lack—no more just barely getting by. We seek You first, and Your kingdom, and all these things will be added unto us. I thank You, Lord, that You will provide all our needs. This is the year we will walk in abundance and have more than enough to give to the kingdom of God. This is the overflow year. No more 'broke, bust, and disgusted.' I thank You, Father, for that in Jesus' name. I hope this word encouraged you. The Lord corrected me very sternly about it. I'm taking it more seriously. We can change things! Yes, there are things that won't change, but Jesus wants you to know all is well in your house. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much, and we love you. Please like this video, share it, and click the notification bell. Please subscribe if you're not subscribed. Bless you all; have a blessed day. Bye-bye.]
